title: Stornoway Airport Café Announces January Closure

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Stornoway Airport Café will be closed for a holiday break throughout the month of January. The closure is part of a planned pause to allow staff time for rest and maintenance of the facility.

HIAL airports, including Stornoway, serve as vital hubs for communities across the Highlands and Islands, where aviation has played a crucial role since the inter-war period.
